new_beliefs.claim: The cb ecosystem migrated to the four-type v2 schema on 2026-06-10: the framework graph (76 nodes re-typed, the c026/c027/c029/c031/c032/c038 contract family superseded by c051-c056, new contracts c057/c058/c059, CLAUDE.md render beliefs superseded and regenerated) and all seven sibling collections (codepath, method, sdl, toy, lib, agent-behavior, paradigm) via mix cb.migrate.v2, with adjudicated splits sdl:a006 -> a008+a009, toy:a9 -> a10+a11, the D3 trim sdl:a3 -> a010, and six agent-behavior mood re-homes (a396-a401). All eight collections verify under v2; sdl reproduces exactly its two teaching method-check failures.

evidence.detail: Executed under Mark's proceed authorization following D1-D6 resolution (D1 'inference' confirmed by Mark for launch, overriding the immutable-history consideration). Execution amendments recorded in the design doc: c026/c027 added to the supersession list (found via plan-0 preflight); document: admitted as a stipulation scheme (the design's own worked re-homes are document-grounded). History re-typed by best fit, never split; dep re-points on a387/c047/c049/a007 recorded in their evidence or here.
